summary: Supplier Certification Console - NEW FEATURES VERIFIED: Raw API Viewer and supplier_request data. All 24 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing confirms Raw API viewer with Request/Response tabs working correctly for all lifecycle steps.
seed_data_creation: Test runs persisted to MongoDB e2e_demo_tests collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: Raw API Viewer, supplier_request data, trace_id in History, Retry failed step. All APIs are SIMULATED/MOCKED.

Raw API Viewer.details: Step drawer has Raw API section with Request/Response tabs. Request tab shows HTTP method, URL, headers, body. Response tab shows supplier_response JSON.

Request Tab.details: Shows method badge (POST/GET/DELETE), URL, headers JSON, body JSON for each lifecycle step

Response Tab.details: Shows supplier_response JSON formatted with syntax highlighting

supplier_request in backend.details: All lifecycle steps return supplier_request with method, url, headers, body fields. Verified via curl and pytest

trace_id in History panel.details: Each history item shows 'trace: trace_xxx' identifier

Retry failed step.details: Retry button visible for FAIL and WARN steps. Calls POST /api/e2e-demo/rerun-step and updates UI

features_already_tested_in_iter118.Certification Card: Score circle, go-live eligibility, passed/failed/warned/skipped counts
features_already_tested_in_iter118.All 6 scenarios: success, price_mismatch, delayed_confirmation, booking_timeout, cancel_success, supplier_unavailable

mocked_apis.note: All supplier APIs are in SIMULATION mode - this is expected and by design for the E2E Demo Console
